name: 24" Lightly Flocked Pine Artificial Christmas Wreath with Pinecones and Red Berries Green - Wondershop™
description:
Give your home a timeless and cheerful accent with this 24-Inch Lightly-Flocked Pine Artificial Christmas Wreath with Pinecones and Berries from Wondershop™. This artificial round Christmas wreath is decorated with flocked mixed tips, faux pinecones and red berries for Christmasy vibes. This ready-to-use wreath comes with a metal base ring for instant hanging so you can accent your front door, wall or window with ease.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
